title: Red Specter WARLORD
description: Autonomous campaign engine orchestrating 40 offensive tools for agentic AI security testing. Plans, coordinates, adapts, and reports multi-tool campaigns across memory poisoning, MCP, trust, and infrastructure surfaces.

items: Available Agent Scanning, Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
